text: Spoke with Rohan. They are happy with the new dashboard rollout.
Rohan called about Invoice #409. Promised to send payment by July 12.
Quarterly review. They complained about slow support response times.
Sent a formal apology. Promised SLA improvement by next week.
Pilot delivery completed. Quality check passed.
They promised to share volume pricing by July 18.
Premium increase notification received. Need to reassess contract.
